name: privacy-audit
description: Privacy & legal document audit skill for Claude Code — checks if your Privacy Policy, ToS, Cookie Policy and DPA actually reflect what your app does. GDPR checklist included.

plugins.name: privacy-audit
plugins.description: Audit your app's legal documents against its actual data practices. Supports code analysis (reads your repo to extract data practices automatically), GDPR checklist, and multi-jurisdiction support (CCPA, LGPD, UK GDPR, and more).
